coordination_skills: pre-plan the return route before taking the objective
hand off or escort the carrier under pursuit
use guards, doors, and messages to maintain extraction tempo
review_metrics: rounds from objective taken to escape
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the extraction under pursuit signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first extraction under pursuit choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on extraction under pursuit without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: Four-room extraction race with a mauler near the objective and a lower return route that can be pre-cleared.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Cinder Exit variant while preserving the extraction under pursuit signal.
